productDisplayName: Maxima Aqua Men White Dial Watch
description: Case style: Analogue watch with a round case Dial style: White dial with blue and grey accents, steel hands, black hour markers Features: Design on the top parts of the rubber strap, branding at the 12 hour mark, screw to reset time Strap style: Rubber strap with a tang clasp Water resistant up to 30 metres Warranty: 1 year
